description: S&P downgrades to BB- from BB; outlook negative. Cited declining foot traffic and margin compression.
Q2 EBITDA missed consensus by 15%. Management withdrew full-year guidance.
Leverage ratio exceeded 7.0x, triggering restricted payments covenant. Obtained limited waiver.
Moody's upgrades to Ba1 from Ba2; outlook stable. Recognized debt paydown and margin improvement.
S&P upgrades to A- from BBB+. Strong free cash flow generation and conservative balance sheet management.
Q4 revenue down 8% YoY. Housing slowdown impacting demand. Announced store closures.
Announced closure of 45 underperforming locations (~12% of fleet). $180mm in restructuring charges.
Fitch downgrades to CCC+ from B-. Negative free cash flow and approaching maturity wall.
Auditor issued going concern qualification. Liquidity runway estimated at 6-9 months.
Repaid $200mm of term loan from operating cash flow. Leverage now below 3.5x.
S&P downgrades to B+ from BB-. Deteriorating margins and increasing competition from fast fashion.
Q3 EBITDA beat by 10%. Luxury resilience continues. Announced $500mm share repurchase.
Interest coverage fell below 1.5x minimum. Creditors considering options.
Successfully refinanced 2025 maturities at 150bps tighter. Market recognizing turnaround story.
